initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN foreign_data.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE cards.id IN (
    SELECT id 
    FROM cards 
    WHERE convertedManaCost IS NULL OR convertedManaCost = 0
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN foreign_data.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE cards.hasPower = 0;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN foreign_data.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE cards.id IN (
    SELECT id 
    FROM cards 
    WHERE id NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT cards.id 
        FROM cards 
        JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid 
        WHERE foreign_data.type LIKE '%Power%'
    )
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.id IN (
    SELECT id 
    FROM cards 
    WHERE id NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT c2.id 
        FROM cards c2
        JOIN foreign_data fd2 ON c2.uuid = fd2.uuid
        WHERE fd2.text LIKE '%power%' OR fd2.flavorText LIKE '%power%'
    )
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN foreign_data.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE cards.id IN (
    SELECT id 
    FROM cards 
    WHERE convertedManaCost IS NULL OR convertedManaCost = 0
);

SELECT

FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE cards.id IN (

        SELECT DISTINCT cards.id 
        FROM cards 
        JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid

    )

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.uuid NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.uuid
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN foreign_data fd2 ON c2.uuid = fd2.uuid
    WHERE fd2.type LIKE '%Power%'
);
